Localization.Description: Power management of the virtual machine guest OSs

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Unable to put into the standby mode the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Unable to restart the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Unable to shut down the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
